ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person responsible for the station */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters above sea level */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensors used at the station (e.g., particulate matter, gas) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the air quality metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the air quality metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., µg/m³, ppb) */,
  "standard_value" REAL /* Standard value for the metric (e.g., WHO guidelines) */,
  "thresholds" TEXT /* JSON object containing different threshold levels and their descriptions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station that collected the data */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the air quality metric */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data was collected (e.g., hourly, daily, weekly) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the measurement (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES air_quality_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_min" (
  "min_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each minimum value */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that has the minimum value */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the air quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("min_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_min_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_max" (
  "max_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maximum value */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that has the maximum value */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the air quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("max_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_max_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_moy" (
  "moy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each average value */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that has the average value */,
  "moy_value" REAL /* Average value of the air quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_moy_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, citizen) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the weather data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the weather data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind (e.g., N, NE, E) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the traffic data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the traffic data was collected */,
  "traffic_volume" REAL /* Traffic volume in vehicles per hour */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit in the area where the traffic data was collected */,
  "traffic_congestion" TEXT /* Level of traffic congestion (e.g., light, moderate, heavy) */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition during the data collection (e.g., clear, rainy, foggy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point used to generate the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., chart, graph, map) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Binary data for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_url" TEXT /* URL to the visualization (if stored externally) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high pollution, low air quality) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message for the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality index */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point used to calculate the index */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Value of the air quality index */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality category */,
  "index_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the index was calculated */,
  "index_duration" TEXT /* Duration over which the index was calculated (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_indexes_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_indexes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES aqi_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aqi_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code associated with the category (e.g., green, yellow, red) */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Description of the health impact for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
